reasoning: As of Feb 15, 2026, Suriname remains politically stable with no ongoing organized armed conflicts or mass political unrest. Moreover, it occurred outside the 30-day windows for both resolution dates. The reference baseline value is 1.000, meaning to resolve YES, 11 or more ACLED fatalities would need to occur within a 30-day window prior to the resolution dates. Given the 360-day base rate of 0 fatalities and the lack of any ongoing organized violence, reaching 11+ fatalities is extremely improbable. I set the probability for 2026-02-22 at the bottom of the allowed range (0.05) since the 30-day period is already nearly complete with no news of violence, and slightly higher (0.06) for 2026-03-17 to account for the future window.
